message:
fix: descriptor-to-code subqueryIn emits nonexistent table, vip-cache refCount bugs

descriptor-to-code.ts:
- subqueryIn emitted .filterIn(col, table("_subquery")...) referencing a
  nonexistent table — now emits .whereIn(col, [values]) since the valueSet
  is already resolved
- offset: 0 was silently dropped due to falsy check — now uses !== undefined

vip-cache.ts:
- get() deleted TTL-expired entries without checking refCount — entries
  acquired via acquire() could be orphaned; now mirrors acquire()'s guard
- set() on a key previously set via setWithTTL() preserved the old
  expiresAt — new value silently expired; now clears expiresAt
- delete() and invalidateByPrefix() ignored refCount — entries with
  refCount > 0 now get pendingEviction=true instead of immediate deletion
